title: Azahares para tu boda
writer: Nicolás de las Llanderas, Mauricio Magdaleno, Arnaldo Malfatti
actors: Fernando Soler, Sara García, Joaquín Pardavé
plot: It is the story of a middle class conservative family at the time of the Mexican Revolution, the eldest daughter must respect the decision of her parents, and follow the traditions of using the wedding flowers her mother used.
